reviews.comment:
En esta estación se pueden conseguir quesos muy bueno y a precio justo! Si tomas un cafe lo mejor que tienen  es la torta de ricota! Excelente!

(Translated by Google)
At this station, you can find very good cheeses at a fair price! If you're having coffee, the best thing they have is the ricotta cake! Excellent!

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
A very good roadside inn. Excellent service. Impeccable facilities.

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion de los playeros .sanitarios impecables y el lugar que pertenece  al ACA detras de la estacion esta muy bueno para comer y descansar.tiene mesas .juegos para chicos y esta muy arbolado.MUY BUENO

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants. Spotless restrooms, and the area belonging to the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) behind the station is great for eating and relaxing. It has tables, a children's playground, and plenty of trees. VERY GOOD.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBN0syMDF3RRAB
